summary: Tested 4 NEW features: Challenges, Events/Flash-Auktionen, Winner Gallery, and Subscriptions/VIP+. All 25 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend pages load correctly with proper UI components.

subscriptions_api.GET /api/subscriptions/vip-plus/status: PASS - Returns VIP+ status and benefits

challenges_api.GET /api/challenges/active: PASS - Returns 3 weekly challenges with progress

events_api.GET /api/events/upcoming: PASS - Returns upcoming events (empty list - no events scheduled)
events_api.GET /api/events/active: PASS - Returns active flash auctions (empty list)
events_api.POST /api/events/subscribe/{id}: PASS - Requires auth, validates event exists

winner_gallery_api.GET /api/winner-gallery/feed: PASS - Returns gallery feed with pagination
winner_gallery_api.POST /api/winner-gallery/upload: PASS - Validates user won the auction

admin_endpoints.admin_role_required: PASS - All admin endpoints return 403 for non-admin users

frontend_pages.Dashboard WeeklyChallenges: PASS - Component visible with 3 challenges, 6 days remaining
frontend_pages.Subscriptions page: PASS - Shows 3 plans (Starter, Pro, VIP+) with correct pricing
frontend_pages.Gallery page: PASS - Shows Gewinner-Galerie with empty state
frontend_pages.Events page: PASS - Shows Flash-Auktionen & Events with empty state

critical_code_review_comments: challenges.py: Well-structured with 8 challenge templates, weekly rotation, progress tracking, and reward claiming
events.py: Complete flash auction system with scheduling, notifications, and subscriptions
gallery.py: Winner photo uploads with admin approval workflow, likes, and featured entries
subscriptions.py: 3-tier subscription system (Starter/Pro/VIP+) with Stripe integration
WeeklyChallenges.js: Clean UI showing 3 challenges with progress bars and claim buttons
Subscriptions.js: Beautiful pricing cards with feature lists and subscribe buttons
WinnerGallery.js: Gallery feed with filters (All/Featured) and photo upload
FlashEvents.js: Events page with upcoming/active sections and countdown timers

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All pages and components working correctly

seed_data_creation: Weekly challenges auto-created for test user (3 challenges assigned)
context_for_next_testing_agent: 4 new features fully tested: (1) Challenges - 8 templates, 3 assigned weekly, progress tracking works, (2) Events - Flash auction system ready but no events scheduled yet, (3) Winner Gallery - Upload/approval workflow ready but no entries yet, (4) Subscriptions - 3 plans with Stripe integration (starter €19.99, pro €34.99, vip_plus €59.99). Test user kunde@bidblitz.de has 3 active challenges with 6 days remaining. All routes registered in App.js: /events, /flash-auctions, /gallery, /winner-gallery, /subscriptions.
